form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of 12 weeks. form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 11 at Nakayama Dirt on March 15 over 2400m, 4 len behind Long Way Home with 58.0kg at $4.70. The start before that made some head-way from midfield; 4th of 13 at Kyoto Dirt on February 14 over 1900m, 1.1 len behind Lokahi with 58.0kg at $3.10. Placed three of last four. Another bold run is expected.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Hard to beat.
